plan_summary.primary_goal: Achieve 99%+ household enumeration coverage with sequenced political data release within budget and timeline.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests whether budget, enumerator pay validation cycle, device integrity, ingestion pipeline MTTR, and political-release timing leave positive margin against stated thresholds.

key_values.label: Budget ceiling (max estimate)
key_values.comment: Upper bound of the stated 12,000-15,000 crore envelope. Acts as the hard fiscal cap for the program.

key_values.label: Target household enumeration coverage
key_values.comment: Coverage threshold below which the success criterion fails. Primary headcount gate.

key_values.label: 5% operational contingency fund
key_values.comment: Ring-fenced reserve for tech remediation, security zones, paper audits. Single pool absorbing multiple shocks per source.
key_values.source_text: 5% contingency fund equivalent to 750 crore managed by Registrar General

key_values.label: Provisional totals deadline (months post-Phase 2)
key_values.comment: Political schedule gate for delimitation. Missing this triggers political crisis.
key_values.source_text: Provisional population totals deadline: 6 months post-Phase 2 completion

key_values.label: Ingestion pipeline MTTR target
key_values.comment: Max restoration time before validation backlog delays 50% contingent pay and triggers attrition.
key_values.source_text: Cloud architecture provides burst capacity 3x average daily volume with MTTR of 4 hours

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised household enumeration coverage
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Realised coverage tested against the 99% target gate.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use stress-test signals: satellite-hub failure (2-5% drop) and fluid-population undercount (5-10%) bound realistic distribution around 99%.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Expected total program cost
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives budget surplus against the 15,000-crore ceiling and consumes contingency on overrun.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor at the 12,000-15,000 stated range; widen upper tail using the >5% overrun stress-test.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised time to provisional release
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against 6-month deadline; admin delays of 2-3 months are the main risk.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Center near 6 months; widen using the 2-3 month admin-delay and 4-8 week monsoon stress-tests.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised ingestion pipeline MTTR
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tested against 4-hour target; breach delays validation pay and triggers attrition cascade.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Center near target; widen upward using the stress-test 'beyond 4-hour MTTR' breach scenarios.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Expected draw on 5% contingency fund
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Multiple shocks (device emergency procurement 400-600 crore, satellite overrun, paper-audit logistics) draw on the same contingency pool; needed to test if buffer survives.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use stress-test numbers: 400-600 crore device emergency anchors center; widen to capture satellite-cost overrun and paper-audit logistics drawing the same pool.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Household coverage margin vs 99% target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Primary success gate of the census; positive means the headcount criterion passes.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Budget surplus against 15,000-crore ceiling
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests fiscal viability before contingency draw; positive = within stated cap.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Provisional release timing margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Political delimitation gate; positive = data released ahead of the deadline.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Ingestion MTTR margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Pipeline stability gates 50% contingent pay; positive = validation backlog avoided.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Contingency buffer after expected draws
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the single 750-crore reserve absorbs device, satellite, and paper-audit shocks per the plan's stated single-pool framing.

unmodelled_gates.label: Q4 2025 legal lock-in of caste methodology
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Mass training of 3M enumerators presumes ECI/NSC sign-off on the final caste data dictionary and linkage logic before deployment.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Late methodology shifts invalidate training, spike error rates, and risk international statistical-body rejection — independent of any financial threshold.

unmodelled_gates.label: Statutory Judicial Review Board by Q3 2025
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Provides binding arbitration over methodology disputes and sequencing; absent it, regional non-cooperation cannot be resolved within the 6-month window.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Methodology disputes escalate to constitutional crisis, freezing delimitation regardless of operational performance.

unmodelled_gates.label: Presidential authorization under Census Act 1948
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Mandatory legal prerequisite for the census to occur at all; no quantifiable threshold the simulation can test.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Without authorization the census cannot lawfully proceed, ending the plan irrespective of budget or coverage.
